Our Students are Entitled to TUBITAK Support

27.05.2022

The support results of the applications made within the scope of the "2209-A Research Project Support Programme for Undergraduate Students", carried out by the TÜBİTAK Scientist Support Programs Presidency, for the 2021/2 term have been announced.

The support results of the applications made within the scope of the "2209-A Research Project Support Programme for Undergraduate Students", carried out by the TÜBİTAK Scientist Support Programs Presidency, for the 2021/2 term have been announced. According to these results, 2 research projects to be carried out by Yunus Yeşil, Nüseybe Karagöz and Ahmet Selim Uçak were entitled to receive support.

We congratulate our students and advisors and wish them continued success.
